title: Starlev's Optimized | Hypixel Skyblock
description: Hypixel Skyblock Modpack on Fabric for Mid/End game players optimized with stable HIGH FPS
body:
# Made by a player, for players ![Hypixel Skyblock Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50874a34be6c87d0fa65307f94474ac6b5915192.png) This modpack provides to play on Hypixel Skyblock with STABLE FPS and using some QOL SKYBLOCK MODS for usual players. (so cool yea) **Modern versions of minecraft have more smoother gameplay than on 1.8.9, so the FPS improvements couldn't be phenomenal and very depending on the power of your machine** ## 📦 Modpack's Resource Pack (<= 1.21.5 version) ![Modpack's Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b40d7e795a930f9dd7f814d498cef3085c649292.jpeg) ## ☕ JVM Arguments These arguments might optimize your Java Machine (cool thing, actually) If this not works well, then remove them :<
➡️ My JVM Arguments ⬅️ ``` -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+UseStringDeduplication -XX:StringDeduplicationAgeThreshold=3 -XX:+DisableExplicitGC ```
## ⚙️ Featured Skyblock Mods - Skyblocker - NoFrills - SkyHanni - Firmament ## 📌 FPS goes BRRR (Hub 1, 59 players) ![FPS TEST | 2.0.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b06651b113ff9b1c8b93608ff193aba43e03ed91.jpeg) ## 🐛 Known Issues - _Is Roughly Enough Items's list empty?_ **Type /neureloadrepo and restart your game** ## 🎀 Other:
My 1.8.9 Hypixel Skyblock Modpack # Starlevka's Skyblock Modpack 1.8.9
Alternative Hypixel Skyblock Modpack on 1.21.10 # Mega's Skyblock
